case_title: DAVILA, VICTORIA VS MURILLO, CHARLLES A. DDS.IND/DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY DAVILA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, CHARLLES A. DDS.IND/DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL FARAHMAND, BARDIE M.D. DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL COMMUNITY DENTAL OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARAHMAND, BARDIE M.D. DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-03-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-21-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT EXPERT WITNESS DECLARATION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-03-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-03-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLTF TO SUBMIT EXPERT WITNESS DECLARATION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVILA, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMUNITY DENTAL OFFICE $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,420.00, PLTF AMENDS HER CLAIM FROM DENTAL MALPRACTICE TO BREACH OF CONTRACT. CHARLLES A. MURILLO DDS IND/ DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. BARDIE FARAHMAND M.D. DBA COMMUNITY DENTAL IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. THE CORRECT DEFT IS COMMUNITY DENTAL OFFICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
